evals.prompt: Go to the 4leads email editor for email #51894 and copy the complete Unlayer design over to email #51895. Change the text in Row 1 to a welcome message.
evals.expected_output: Design copied in 4-5 tool calls. sessionStorage used for persistence. No orientation screenshots. Bundled evaluate_script for export+store+structure.

assertions.name: no-orientation-screenshot
assertions.description: No take_screenshot used purely for page orientation (checking which page we are on). Screenshots only for visual debugging or final verification.

assertions.name: bundled-export
assertions.description: Design export, sessionStorage store, and structure inspection happen in a single evaluate_script call, not as 2-3 separate calls.

assertions.name: max-tool-calls
assertions.description: Total Chrome DevTools MCP tool calls should be <= 6.

assertions.name: no-take-snapshot
assertions.description: take_snapshot is never used during the workflow.

assertions.name: minimal-reasoning
assertions.description: No verbose explanatory paragraphs between tool calls. Reasoning text between Chrome calls is at most 1 short sentence each, or zero.

assertions.name: session-storage-used
assertions.description: sessionStorage is used to persist data across page navigation, not window variables.

evals.prompt: I need a table with all email campaigns from the 4leads dashboard. Go to the campaign overview and extract name, status, open rate, and click rate as JSON.
evals.expected_output: Data extracted via evaluate_script as JSON. Max 3-4 tool calls. No take_snapshot.

assertions.name: json-output
assertions.description: Final output is structured JSON, not a screenshot or prose description of the data.

assertions.name: no-take-snapshot
assertions.description: take_snapshot is never used.

assertions.name: max-tool-calls
assertions.description: Total Chrome DevTools MCP tool calls should be <= 4.

assertions.name: evaluate-script-primary
assertions.description: Data extraction uses evaluate_script with DOM queries, not snapshot parsing or screenshots.

assertions.name: no-orientation-screenshot
assertions.description: No screenshot taken just to see which page is loaded.

evals.prompt: Fill the contact form on our website: Name: Test User, Email: test@example.com, Message: Test inquiry. Then click submit.
evals.expected_output: fill_form used with all fields at once. Max 3 tool calls total.

assertions.name: fill-form-used
assertions.description: fill_form is used with all fields at once, not individual fill calls per field.

assertions.name: max-tool-calls
assertions.description: Total Chrome DevTools MCP tool calls should be <= 3.

assertions.name: no-screenshot
assertions.description: No take_screenshot used during the form filling process.

evals.prompt: Build a new automation in 4leads: When a contact gets tag 'newsletter-signup', wait 2 days, then send email 'Welcome Sequence #1'. Activate the automation.
evals.expected_output: Helper _4A injected from references/js-helpers.md. Actions bundled into chained evaluate_script calls. Max 8 calls.

assertions.name: helper-injected
assertions.description: A domain-specific helper object (e.g., _4A) is injected via evaluate_script before interacting with the automation builder.

assertions.name: bundled-actions
assertions.description: Multiple sequential actions (like clickPlus + selectAction) are bundled into single evaluate_script calls where possible.

assertions.name: max-tool-calls
assertions.description: Total Chrome DevTools MCP tool calls should be <= 10.

assertions.name: no-orientation-screenshot
assertions.description: No screenshot used just to check page state. evaluate_script with status() used instead.

assertions.name: references-consulted
assertions.description: The skill references/js-helpers.md was read before starting the workflow, to use existing helpers.

evals.prompt: Scrape all product prices from our Shopify admin. There are about 20 products across 2 pages.
evals.expected_output: Multi-page scraping with evaluate_script in loop. No take_snapshot in loop. API interception considered.

assertions.name: no-snapshot-in-loop
assertions.description: take_snapshot is never used inside the pagination loop.

assertions.name: no-screenshot-in-loop
assertions.description: take_screenshot is not used inside the pagination loop.

assertions.name: api-interception-considered
assertions.description: The model either uses list_network_requests to intercept API data, or uses evaluate_script for DOM extraction. Both are valid, but take_snapshot is not.

assertions.name: compact-data-return
assertions.description: Data is returned as compact JSON, not verbose DOM dumps.

assertions.name: max-tool-calls
assertions.description: Total Chrome DevTools MCP tool calls should be <= 12 for 20 products across 2 pages.
